│ Settings                                                                                                             │
│                                                                                                                      │
│ Moshi (mobile push)                                                                                                  │
│   · moshi-hook not installed.                                                                                        │
│   Run ccmux moshi-setup in a shell to install + pair.                                                                │
│                                                                                                                      │
│ ccmux version    v0.0.0-golden                                                                                       │
│ config file      /Users/me/.config/ccmux/config.toml                                                                 │
│                                                                                                                      │
│ Editable (↑/↓ to move, enter to edit, e to open config in $EDITOR)                                                   │
│ ▸ projects.root          /Users/mchoi/Projects                                                                       │
│   Where ccmux looks for projects (~/Projects default).                                                               │
│   subscription.tier      max5x                                                                                       │
│   agents.default         claude                                                                                      │
│   sessions.attach_mode   mirror                                                                                      │
│   update.auto_check      on                                                                                          │
│   theme                  catppuccin-mocha  (read-only)                                                               │
│                                                                                                                      │
│ Sleep prevention                                                                                                     │
│   mode           safe                                                                                                │
│   idle release   10 minutes                                                                                          │
│   low-batt cutoff 20% (dangerous auto-downgrades below this)                                                         │
│                                                                                                                      │
│ Daemon                                                                                                               │
│   poll interval  2s                                                                                                  │
│   needs-input idle 3s                                                                                                │
│   tailnet listen false (port 7474)                                                                                   │
│                                                                                                                      │
│ Remote hosts                                                                                                         │
│   (none pinned — tailnet peers running ccmuxd are auto-discovered.                                                   │
│    Use `ccmux host add` only for non-Tailscale hosts or non-default ports.)                                          │
